title: FocusBuddy
description: Focus Buddy is an ADHD-focused, gamified productivity web app built with FastAPI.It combines mission-based focus sessions, ADHD support tools, and parent supervision features with PIN-protected reporting.

title: Async Distributed Web Crawler
description: An asynchronous, distributed web crawler written in Python. Uses Redis for the frontier, Motor/MongoDB for page storage, and includes polite crawling (robots, rate limiting), retry logic, metrics and a static snapshot dashboard for monitoring. Packaged with Docker and a CLI for domain analytics and status dumps.

title: NeRF-Neural-Radiance-Fields-for-3D-Scene-Reconstruction
description: Minimal PyTorch NeRF trainer that can overfit a tiny synthetic scene quickly on CPU.

title: Data-Masker-Smart-Data-Redactor
description: Data Masker is a fast, configurable CLI that detects and masks PII

title: Toxicity-Detection-Discord-Bot
description: Real-time Discord toxicity detection bot using ML/NLP with configurable thresholds and admin controls for fast, accurate moderation.
